title: FunMinecraft
description: A modpack that makes the minecraft experience a bit more fun, with some optimization mods, some more mods that don't add anything major and lots of client side mods.
body:
# ----Info----   
#### A modpack that makes the minecraft experience a bit more fun, with some optimization mods, some   more mods that don't add anything major and lots of client side mods.    
# ----Performance----   
#### The modpack should run good. with 2 gb ram I had 150-180 fps standing in a new world. If you have a good pc(unlike me), you can run it with shaders.
# ----Mods----
<details>
<summary>Optimization Mods</summary>

Alternate Current  
Clumps  
Cull Less Leaves  
Dynamic FPS  
Enhanced Block Entities  
Entity Culling    
Exordium  
FastAnim  
FerriteCore  
ImmediatelyFast  
Krypton  
Ksyxis  
Lithium  
Memory Leak Fix  
ModernFix    
Reese's Sodium Options  
ServerCore  
Sodium  
Sodium Extra  
Very Many Players  
lazy-language-loader

</details>
<details>

Bookshelf

Just Enough Resources

<details>
<summary>Resource packs and Shaders</summary>
Faithful 64x  
  
Fullbright UB     
Complementary Reimagined   
Complementary Shaders v4  
  

</details>

# ----Purpose----  
#### I made this modpack so I and other players can have a fun experience with some mc mods and still have performance, and for lightweight modded servers. The original reason I made this was different.

# ----Usage----  
#### You can use this modpack in your server, for singleplayer and for lan world(make sure both players have the modpack if you play lan). If you want the server side mods to take effect, you need to have these in the server, but you can also use this modpack in a vanilla server, since it has lots of client side mods like optimization mods and QOL mods.   
# ----Support----
#### if you have any problems with the modpack, dm me(legoaggelos) on discord.
